hero_subtitle: SFTY connects Travel Rule messaging, risk signals, exception handling, and audit evidence into a unified compliance workflow tailored for digital asset exchanges.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_title: Travel Rule workflows lack unified integration
problem_description: Exchanges struggle with disconnected Travel Rule messages, incomplete originator and beneficiary data, and fractured routing statuses. This fragmentation slows compliance reviews, complicates exception handling, and weakens the audit trail needed for defensible decisions.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY aggregates originator and beneficiary data, routing statuses, exceptions and case records into one traceable compliance workflow so exchange teams can manage Travel Rule reviews with full audit evidence.
workflow_title: From Travel Rule exceptions to case evidence
workflow_description: SFTY moves Travel Rule message data, exceptions and routing status through case creation, review, decision logging and audit evidence for compliance teams at exchanges.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Beyond message routing. Travel Rule evidence
why_sfty_description: SFTY turns fragmented Travel Rule data from multiple providers into connected cases, decisions, audit evidence and reporting for clearer exchange compliance workflows.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports exchanges by connecting Travel Rule messaging, case evidence and risk data within a controlled, audit-ready compliance workflow and enterprise deployment framework.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance
ask_sfty_placeholder: How can SFTY support Travel Rule workflows for exchanges
ask_sfty_chip_1_message: Explain how Travel Rule messages become case evidence
ask_sfty_chip_2_message: Show how exchanges track Travel Rule message exceptions
ask_sfty_chip_3_message: Explain how SFTY manages provider routing and audit logs
ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for digital asset exchanges?
faq_1_answer: SFTY connects Travel Rule messages, wallet data, cases and reviews into a single operational workflow tailored for digital asset exchanges’ compliance needs.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY manage Travel Rule exceptions?
faq_2_answer: SFTY routes failed or incomplete Travel Rule messages into structured cases, enabling review, escalation and resolution while preserving audit-ready records.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve Travel Rule evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves decision logs, case history and provider outputs to support audit evidence for Travel Rule compliance reviews and regulatory inspection readiness.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing Travel Rule providers?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY integrates with existing Travel Rule providers to connect message routing, status tracking, exception handling and related compliance workflows.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace Travel Rule compliance tools?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY acts as a compliance layer above providers, connecting their outputs into structured workflows without replacing underlying Travel Rule tools.
final_title: Connect Travel Rule messages into reviewable cases
final_description: Review how SFTY structures Travel Rule messages, exceptions, decisions and evidence into one controlled compliance workflow for your exchange.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
